top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh will not be the Fed 'chair.' His immediate predecessors were
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh's two immediate predecessors preferred to be called the Fed "chair." For Warsh, it's "chairman" of the Federal Reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PeaceGold, SigraFi sign responsible artisanal gold supply deal in DRC
top_signals.summary: PeaceGold was set up in 2013 with local nonprofit Conflict Resolution Center to help formalize artisanal mining and reintegrate former combatants into regulated work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New champion to be appointed for Britain’s mutuals and co-operatives
top_signals.summary: Plans for a new champion for mutuals and co-ops have been unveiled in a speech by the Economic Secretary to the Treasury in Birmingham today.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Mid-term money-saver: DOT wants to pre-screen containers to speed supply chain
top_signals.summary:
The Trump administration unveiled a program to pre-screen import containers and streamline connections through the supply chain.

The post Mid-term money-saver: DOT wants to pre-screen containers to speed supply chain appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ice Cube: Ready To Take BIG3 to the Next Level
top_signals.summary: Rapper & Co-Founder of Big3 league Ice Cube, discusses the league preparing to go public after a $290 million valuation. He discusses the early days of the league, how the fans have really embraced it, and what it means to be the first publicly traded sports league. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Randall Williams on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Energy Secretary Wright on America's Energy Strategy
top_signals.summary: Chris Wright, Secretary, US Department of Energy discusses energy security, supply chains and global markets with Bloomberg’s Annmarie Hordern at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Advanced Shipping & Trading – WEEKLY SHIPPING MARKET REPORT WEEK 24 2026
top_signals.summary: Alberta Shipmanagement have committed their Capesize “Kerkis” 176/2007 Namura & Sasebo, Japan (SS/DD 11/2026)   Source: Advanced Shipping & Trading S.A.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Energy Market Leaders on Navigating Risk
top_signals.summary: Rebecca Babin, Managing Director & Senior Energy Trader, CIBC Private Wealth and Dan Pickering, Founder & Chief Investment Officer, Pickering Energy Partners discuss volatility, diversification and returns across energy markets with Bloomberg’s Julie Fine at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)

European Commission Speech Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Dear friends of the New European Bauhaus,

Good afternoon to you all,

top_signals.title: Hertha Metals targets rare-earth magnet supply gap with Texas high-purity iron plant
top_signals.summary: Company plans to break ground this summer on a plant that will produce 10,000 tonnes per year of high-purity iron used in permanent magnets.
